title: Better Money Mod
description: A mod that adds all US bills up to 10,000 dollars.
body:
💵 **Better Money Mod (NeoForge 1.21.1)**

Bring real-world currency into Minecraft with the Better Money Mod! Perfect for roleplay, trading, or building your own economy.

✨ **Features**

U.S. Dollar Bills: Adds denominations of

$1, $5, $10, $50, $100, $500, $1,000, $5,000, and $10,000.

Wallet:

Compact storage designed specifically for money.

Includes a dedicated ID/keycard slot for compatibility with other mods that use IDs or access cards.

Simple Recipe:

Craft a wallet using 2 Leather + 1 String.

**✨ Why Use Better Money Mod?**

Easy-to-use economy system for servers.

Trade, roleplay, and manage your money just like in real life.

Expandable foundation for shops, security systems, and more!
